_comment: Samwise the Stouthearted (LTR, {1}{W} flash legendary 2/1). ETB target = a permanent card in your graveyard put there from the battlefield this turn (Gap 20). Flow: activate Cirith Ungol Patrol sacrificing Mirkwood Spider → Spider lands in your graveyard with the Gap 20 marker set; then flash in Samwise → ETB pauses to target the Spider → Spider returns to your hand → the Ring tempts you.
